summary: Saudi Arabia works to its own National Cryptographic Standards, issued by the National Cybersecurity Authority, which set minimum cryptographic requirements for national systems across MODERATE and ADVANCED levels and include a dedicated post-quantum cryptography appendix. The Authority has consulted on adding post-quantum algorithms to the standard, while the Communications, Space and Technology Commission guides the ICT sector to run pilots and build crypto-agility.
govActors:
NCA | National Cybersecurity Authority, issues the National Cryptographic Standards with a post-quantum cryptography appendix and consulted on adding post-quantum algorithms
CST | Communications, Space and Technology Commission, guidance for the ICT sector on the quantum threat and post-quantum cryptography
provenance: summary + govActors (NCA) + standardFamilies: NCA National Cryptographic Standards NCS-1:2020 (English, Arabic and overview-page results rows), which define MODERATE/ADVANCED levels and a post-quantum cryptography appendix; plus the NCA public-consultation announcement adding post-quantum algorithms, random number generators and quantum key distribution (included results rows)

dominantProcess Sovereign: the NCA runs its own national scheme list (NCS-1:2020) with its own accepted primitives and assurance levels, the hallmark of a sovereign posture. The CST ICT guidance advises monitoring NIST/ETSI/ENISA but that is tracking international work, not adopting a camp - REVIEW

summary + govActors (CST): CST Securing Data in the Quantum Computing Era guidance, advising organisations to define PQC needs, verify vendor readiness, integrate PQC into transformation plans, monitor NIST/ETSI/ENISA and run PQC pilots (included results row)
hybridDeployment None stated: no included document states a hybrid position

algorithms / migrationTimeline / targetCompletion: OMITTED. The consultation adds post-quantum algorithms but the included summaries name none specifically, and no dated milestones or completion date are stated
govActors (DGA): OMITTED. The Digital Government Authority quantum-computing page is included:false (explicit PQC reference unconfirmed, direct fetch blocked) - REVIEW
Model 2026-06-14 (NIST-bloc / taker, Medium): NCS-1:2020 is a national standard profiling NIST best practices, not a sovereign algorithm. Reclassified from Sovereign.
